paragraphs.text: 放暑假了，爸爸妈妈带我去坐飞机旅行。这是我第一次坐飞机，好兴奋！
paragraphs.translation: Summer vacation started. Mom and Dad took me on a plane trip. This was my first time on a plane, I was so excited!

paragraphs.text: 飞机在跑道上滑行，然后越跑越快。突然，飞机起飞了，冲向蓝天！我的心砰砰跳。
paragraphs.translation: The plane taxied on the runway, going faster and faster. Suddenly, the plane took off, soaring into the blue sky! My heart was pounding.

paragraphs.text: 从窗户往外看，地上的房子变得像积木一样小，白云就在身边飘过。坐飞机真奇妙！
paragraphs.translation: Looking out the window, the houses on the ground became as small as building blocks, white clouds drifted past. Flying on a plane is amazing!
